title: Mina at the Cafe
logline: Mina spends a quiet afternoon at her usual cafe.

shots.action: Wide establishing of the wooden cafe interior, empty tables, soft window light
shots.motion_prompt: very subtle ambient light shift, static camera

shots.action: Mina sits by the window holding a ceramic coffee cup, soft smile
shots.motion_prompt: gentle camera push-in, natural blink, steam from cup

shots.action: Close-up of Mina's eyes looking out the window thoughtfully
